assumptions: The System Requirement section is the canonical MVP scope baseline.
Prior clarification answers are locked and must be treated as implementation constraints.
MVP prioritizes flow integrity and governance over phase-2 optimization features.

acceptanceSignals: RBAC tests cover allow/deny for employee, vendor operator, committee admin, and payroll operator.
Authenticated context always carries actorId, role, and scoped plant info.
HTTP and MCP paths use the same authorization policy engine.
excludedApproaches: Using a single unified corporate IdP for all roles.
Using local accounts for all roles.
Maintaining separate auth logic stacks for HTTP and MCP.
executionConstraints: Use employee/committee corporate SSO plus vendor account with MFA as the only identity model.
All write operations require authenticated actor context and auditable identity linkage.
Authorization policy must be centralized and reused across transport layers.
features.name: Identity and Access Governance
features.rationale: Every business flow depends on correct identity boundaries and role enforcement.
features.summary: Establish unified authentication, authorization, and actor-context foundations.

acceptanceSignals: All official external HTTP endpoints are present in OpenAPI 3.1.
CI publishes machine-readable spec and browsable API docs artifacts.
Generated client/types build without manual type patching.
excludedApproaches: Shipping externally used endpoints that are absent from OpenAPI.
Treating handwritten API interfaces as primary contract source.
Deferring contract updates to later releases.
executionConstraints: OpenAPI 3.1 is the formal contract for employee, vendor, admin, and integration HTTP APIs.
Contract must define schemas, errors, auth, pagination/sort/filter, enums, and validation constraints.
Auth declarations in the spec must match the locked SSO+vendor-MFA model.
features.name: OpenAPI Contract Platform
features.rationale: Contract-first control is required to prevent implementation and integration drift.
features.summary: Build and enforce the canonical machine-verifiable HTTP contract.

acceptanceSignals: CI fails when runtime HTTP routes drift from OpenAPI.
CI fails when generated API artifacts drift from the committed contract.
MCP contract checks are wired and automatically enforced once MCP endpoints/tools are present.
excludedApproaches: Manual periodic contract review as the primary drift defense.
Allowing runtime behavior changes without synchronized contract updates.
Schema-only snapshot checks without behavior verification.
executionConstraints: Introduce merge-time contract conformance gates early in implementation.
Require synchronized updates to spec, generated artifacts, tests, and implementation.
Enable MCP parity checks in the same CI pipeline when `mcp-server-domain-parity` lands.
features.name: Contract Conformance CI
features.rationale: Early contract gates reduce architectural retries and integration churn.
features.summary: Establish automated contract drift prevention for the delivery stream.

acceptanceSignals: Committee admin can approve/reject/request-fix vendor applications with full history.
Expiry reminders and suspension triggers run from configured document templates.
Suspended vendors are automatically hidden from ordering surfaces.
excludedApproaches: Using one fixed mandatory document set for all vendor types.
Relying on manual expiry tracking as the operating model.
Deferring retention/deletion policy definition until after launch.
executionConstraints: Implement configurable compliance document templates by vendor category.
Apply automated expiry reminders and suspension/reinstatement workflow.
Persist review and lifecycle history under the defined retention/deletion policy.
features.name: Vendor Compliance Lifecycle
features.rationale: Vendor legality and governance directly affect service safety and eligibility.
features.summary: Implement onboarding, document governance, and compliance lifecycle controls.

acceptanceSignals: Employee-visible vendor list is always filtered by plant and active service window.
Admin mapping changes take effect immediately and are auditable.
Deliverability checks are enforced server-side for browse/search/order APIs.
excludedApproaches: Per-plant independent timezone evaluation.
Internal UTC-only business boundary logic for cutoff/availability.
Client-only deliverability filtering.
executionConstraints: Evaluate service windows with fixed Asia/Taipei business-time semantics.
Store and enforce vendor-plant-time mappings as authoritative backend constraints.
Define deterministic precedence for overlapping mapping rules.
features.name: Vendor Plant Delivery Mapping
features.rationale: Incorrect mapping causes non-deliverable exposure and operational failure.
features.summary: Control where and when each vendor can serve and enforce those rules globally.

acceptanceSignals: Vendors can manage menu items, prices, images, and daily quotas.
Quota accounting prevents oversell under concurrent ordering.
Configured preorder window and cutoff rules are enforced in ordering APIs.
excludedApproaches: Using non-atomic quota updates that allow oversell.
Using non-Taipei business-time boundary calculations.
Defaulting to unrestricted free-text special requests.
executionConstraints: Default preorder open window supports up to 7 days ahead with policy-bounded vendor overrides.
Default modify/cancel cutoff is previous day 17:00 Asia/Taipei with bounded vendor override.
Special-request schema must remain controlled and risk-limited pending final clarification.
features.name: Menu Supply and Window Management
features.rationale: Supply and time-window correctness is central to order predictability.
features.summary: Enable safe menu management, quota control, and cutoff governance.

acceptanceSignals: Tracing, metrics, and logs are correlated via OpenTelemetry across services.
Hard-SLO dashboards and alert rules are published for release gating and can be extended per domain.
Kubernetes manifests include readiness/liveness and scaling signals tied to load.
excludedApproaches: Operating without hard SLO definitions before production.
Relying on unstructured logs without correlation context.
Shipping without production alert thresholds for peak periods.
executionConstraints: Instrument services with OpenTelemetry to VictoriaMetrics/VictoriaLogs/VictoriaTraces and Grafana.
Define and publish hard SLO dashboards used by release gates.
Set pre-launch load-test acceptance thresholds required by hard SLO policy.
features.name: Observability and Kubernetes SLO Baseline
features.rationale: High-scale reliability and release safety depend on measurable runtime signals.
features.summary: Establish reusable observability and SLO-governed deployment controls before peak-risk flows ship.

acceptanceSignals: Order state transitions enforce cutoff and validation rules with explicit domain errors.
Inventory reservation/release is idempotent and concurrency-safe.
Order timeline includes modification, cancel, sold-out, and refund-related states.
excludedApproaches: Best-effort inventory mutation without transactional guarantees.
Allowing post-cutoff modifications without hard denial.
Operating without hard performance gate definitions.
executionConstraints: Implement a strict order lifecycle with atomic reservation and release behavior.
Evaluate cutoff with fixed Asia/Taipei business-time rules.
Satisfy hard, pre-launch SLO gate for peak ordering throughput and latency.
Keep special-request handling in controlled schema boundaries.
features.name: Order State and Inventory Engine
features.rationale: Transaction correctness prevents count drift and downstream reconciliation errors.
features.summary: Implement robust order lifecycle and inventory integrity controls.

acceptanceSignals: Employees can preorder across multiple future dates in calendar/week views.
Search and filters cover price, type, health tags, deliverability, and exact remaining quantity.
Core discovery remains fully functional with recommendation flags disabled.
excludedApproaches: Recommendation-first UI that weakens deterministic filtering.
Showing non-deliverable vendors or items to users.
Coarse inventory ranges instead of exact remaining counts.
executionConstraints: Prioritize deterministic search/filter over recommendation behavior for MVP.
Apply Asia/Taipei window/cutoff semantics consistently in UI and API results.
Use backend authoritative inventory counters for remaining quantity display.
features.name: Employee Discovery and Preorder
features.rationale: Employee-side usability and transparency are required for adoption at scale.
features.summary: Deliver multi-day discovery and preorder entry with accurate availability context.

acceptanceSignals: TOTP QR verification is single-use and replay-protected.
Invalid or expired code scans are rejected with auditable events.
Peak verification load tests meet locked SLO targets before release.
excludedApproaches: Fallback production flow using manual PIN/name check as primary path.
Long-lived static QR payloads.
Operating without hard performance acceptance thresholds.
executionConstraints: Use TOTP QR as the sole production pickup verification mechanism.
Apply fixed Asia/Taipei time semantics for token validity boundaries.
Block release until hard throughput/latency/error-rate SLO checks pass.
features.name: Pickup TOTP Check-in
features.rationale: Pickup speed and correctness are critical frontline operational risks.
features.summary: Provide secure high-throughput on-site verification and meal claim updates.

acceptanceSignals: Vendor operations board shows per-plant counts, special needs, and delivery status in near real-time.
System exports daily summary, plant partition sheet, labels, and basket list.
Export artifacts are generated from immutable batch snapshots.
excludedApproaches: Manual spreadsheet consolidation as the primary fulfillment workflow.
Generating packing artifacts from mutable live query state.
Unrestricted free-text modifier printing in labels by default.
executionConstraints: Generate fulfillment outputs from deterministic snapshot batches.
Expose real-time operational board with auditable status transitions.
Render special-request data only through controlled, low-risk structure.
features.name: Vendor Fulfillment Board and Exports
features.rationale: Fulfillment quality directly affects leakage, mispack, and wrong-delivery incidents.
features.summary: Support vendor prep and delivery execution with structured operational outputs.

acceptanceSignals: Audit query supports filtering by actor, action, entity, and time.
Cross-flow correlation IDs link order, verification, review, and settlement events.
Audit retention and purge jobs follow policy and are test-verified.
excludedApproaches: Anonymous actor records for high-risk operations.
Using only transient service logs as audit evidence.
Deferring retention/deletion implementation after launch.
executionConstraints: All high-risk writes must emit immutable audit events with actor identity from locked auth model.
Audit storage/query lifecycle must follow defined retention/deletion policy.
Provide committee-admin investigation queries for responsibility attribution.
features.name: Audit Trail and Investigation Query
features.rationale: Governance, compliance, and dispute handling require durable accountability records.
features.summary: Implement immutable audit evidence and admin investigation capabilities.

acceptanceSignals: Employees can view per-order deductions, refunds, and dispute statuses.
Ledger entries are append-only with source event references.
Dispute workflow has owner, timestamps, and resolution trace.
excludedApproaches: Using manual CSV upload as official payroll interface path.
Overwriting financial records in place without adjustment lineage.
Keeping payroll/PII indefinitely without policy controls.
executionConstraints: Use SFTP batch as core payroll exchange path; support HR API sync as optional adjunct.
Implement immutable per-order payroll ledger with traceable adjustments.
Apply defined retention/deletion policy to payroll and dispute data.
features.name: Payroll Ledger and Dispute Tracking
features.rationale: Employee trust and finance control require transparent and traceable deductions.
features.summary: Deliver transparent payroll accounting and dispute lifecycle visibility.

acceptanceSignals: Monthly close generates immutable cycle snapshots with deterministic totals.
HR export includes required exception classes and reconciliation metadata.
Re-run behavior for same cycle is idempotent unless authorized unlock occurs.
excludedApproaches: Using manual CSV ingestion as official close channel.
Using non-Taipei date boundaries for monthly cycle calculations.
Allowing unlocked recomputation without audit reason.
executionConstraints: Run monthly settlement on fixed Asia/Taipei cycle boundaries.
Use SFTP batch export as mandatory settlement output path; API sync can complement.
Support lock/unlock with explicit reason and immutable close snapshots.
features.name: Monthly Settlement and HR Export
features.rationale: Automated close and exception handling are first-phase governance requirements.
features.summary: Automate monthly financial close, export, and exception processing.

acceptanceSignals: Rules trigger alerts for expiry risk, on-time degradation, satisfaction drop, and complaint spikes.
Each alert has owner, status lifecycle, and closure note.
Escalation and SLA status are queryable and auditable.
excludedApproaches: Alert-only notifications with no owner/workflow tracking.
Closing alerts without accountable disposition records.
Hardcoding non-configurable thresholds with no governance metadata.
executionConstraints: Provide rule-based anomaly detection and tracked remediation workflow.
Support owner assignment, SLA timing, and closure evidence in alert lifecycle.
Finalize ticket-integration depth per remaining clarification without blocking baseline workflow.
features.name: Anomaly Alert Workflow
features.rationale: Committee governance requires actionable anomaly handling, not passive reporting.
features.summary: Deliver anomaly detection with ownership and remediation tracking.

acceptanceSignals: MCP tools/resources cover ordering, verification, compliance review, settlement query/export, and anomaly operations.
Parity tests confirm MCP and HTTP share validation, authz, and error behavior.
High-risk MCP writes are authorization-checked and fully audited.
excludedApproaches: Network-trust-only authentication for MCP access.
A separate MCP-only domain logic implementation.
Unscoped broad MCP credentials without tool-level RBAC.
executionConstraints: Use OAuth service-account + tool-level RBAC as the core MCP authz model.
Support optional short-lived key bridging only under strict rotation and audit controls.
MCP must call the same domain services used by HTTP APIs.
features.name: MCP Server Domain Parity
features.rationale: Agent integration is a required first-class surface with strict security parity needs.
features.summary: Implement secure MCP access over shared domain logic and permission controls.

acceptanceSignals: Feature is disabled by default in MVP environments.
Enabling recommendations does not remove deterministic search/filter behavior.
Recommendation failures do not block ordering flows.
excludedApproaches: Always-on recommendation in MVP rollout.
Replacing core filtering with recommendation-only ranking.
Introducing separate source-of-truth state for recommendation outputs.
executionConstraints: Ship behind runtime feature flag default OFF.
Treat recommendation as additive ranking layer only.
Preserve deterministic discovery behavior when flag is OFF.
features.name: Recommendation Engine
features.rationale: Recommendations are phase-2 value add and must not destabilize MVP.
features.summary: Provide optional recommendation capability behind controlled rollout.

acceptanceSignals: Reminder scheduling supports preorder-open and demand-spike scenarios.
Users can opt out and preferences are enforced.
Reminder delivery failures do not impact ordering correctness.
excludedApproaches: Making reminder delivery a prerequisite for successful ordering.
Sending unthrottled notifications without preference controls.
Hardcoding one static reminder strategy for all contexts.
executionConstraints: Ship behind runtime feature flag default OFF.
Use policy-driven scheduling with throttling and preference checks.
Keep reminder workflows operationally isolated from transaction paths.
features.name: Rush Reminder Notifications
features.rationale: Reminder capability is phase-2 and should remain non-critical to MVP flow.
features.summary: Add optional notification support for open-window and rush cases.

acceptanceSignals: Dashboards provide vendor/plant/time breakdown with metric definitions.
Feature-off state removes dashboard UI/API exposure.
Analytics queries run on governed aggregates without harming transactional workloads.
excludedApproaches: Replacing governance workflow actions with dashboard-only monitoring.
Querying hot transactional tables directly for interactive analytics.
Publishing KPI views without formula/source documentation.
executionConstraints: Ship behind runtime feature flag default OFF.
Use versioned metric definitions and pre-aggregated analytical models.
Keep operational governance workflow as primary action path.
features.name: Advanced Analytics Dashboard
features.rationale: Deep analytics is phase-2 and should build on stable MVP data contracts.
features.summary: Provide optional advanced operations analytics for admin and vendor views.

options.label: 員工SSO+商家MFA
options.rationale: 員工與福委會走企業 IdP，商家走獨立帳號與 MFA，平衡治理與外部協作。

options.label: 全角色統一IdP
options.rationale: 治理集中但對外商家導入成本高。

options.label: 全角色本地帳號
options.rationale: 實作快但風險與治理成本高。

clarifications.prompt: 身份來源與登入模型要採哪一種主路徑？
clarifications.rationale: 身份模型直接決定 RBAC、審計與 MCP 權限設計。
clarifications.recommendationSummary: 已決議採員工/福委會企業 SSO + 商家獨立帳號 MFA。

issues.details: 已由先前澄清鎖定正式身份來源模型。
issues.title: 身份來源與登入邊界未定

options.label: SFTP批次檔
options.rationale: 符合月結批次節奏，易與鎖帳整合。

options.label: HR API同步
options.rationale: 提升回寫即時性，作為增量整合。

options.label: 人工CSV上傳
options.rationale: 不可追溯且穩定性不足。

clarifications.prompt: 薪資扣款資料交換要採哪些正式通道？
clarifications.rationale: 交換通道決定月結可靠性與重送可驗證性。
clarifications.recommendationSummary: 已決議 SFTP 為核心，HR API 為可選，人工 CSV 排除。

issues.details: 已鎖定 HR 交換契約主路徑與排除方案。
issues.title: HR 薪資整合契約未定

options.label: OAuth服務帳號+RBAC
options.rationale: 最符合高風險工具治理需求。

options.label: 短效金鑰橋接
options.rationale: 可支援特定自動化場景。

options.label: 僅內網信任
options.rationale: 缺乏可驗證身份與最小權限。

clarifications.prompt: MCP server 的認證授權模式要採哪些正式機制？
clarifications.rationale: MCP 涉及高風險讀寫操作，必須可稽核與可控。
clarifications.recommendationSummary: 已決議 OAuth+RBAC 為核心，可選短效金鑰橋接。

issues.details: 已鎖定 MCP 安全模型主路徑。
issues.title: MCP 權限與安全模型未定

options.label: 先定硬性SLO
options.rationale: 可在上線前客觀驗證尖峰可用性。

options.label: 先上線後優化
options.rationale: 現場失控風險高。

options.label: 不定SLO
options.rationale: 缺乏可放行標準。

clarifications.prompt: 尖峰領餐核銷與下單流程要以哪種效能門檻作為上線標準？
clarifications.rationale: 單一路徑核銷需可量測的放行條件。
clarifications.recommendationSummary: 已決議上線前必須通過硬性 SLO 驗證。

issues.details: 已鎖定硬性 SLO gate 策略。
issues.title: 尖峰吞吐與延遲 SLO 未定

options.label: 固定 Asia/Taipei
options.rationale: 業務邊界最直觀且一致。

options.label: 各廠區獨立時區
options.rationale: 擴張彈性高但複雜度過大。

options.label: 內部UTC換算
options.rationale: 易與業務認知產生偏差。

clarifications.prompt: 截單、預購視窗與月結週期要用哪個時間/行事曆基準？
clarifications.rationale: 時間基準影響訂單與結算邊界一致性。

issues.details: 已鎖定統一時區/行事曆基準。
issues.title: 時間與行事曆計算基準未定

options.label: 可配置文件模板
options.rationale: 能覆蓋不同商家型態與到期治理需求。

options.label: 單一必備文件
options.rationale: 覆蓋不足且彈性差。

options.label: 人工追蹤到期
options.rationale: 缺乏自動治理能力。

clarifications.prompt: 商家合規文件要採哪種治理模型？
clarifications.rationale: 文件治理模型直接影響審核與停權品質。
clarifications.recommendationSummary: 已決議採可配置模板與自動到期治理。

issues.details: 已鎖定商家文件治理模型。
issues.title: 商家文件政策細節未定

options.label: 明確保留與刪除政策
options.rationale: 同時滿足稽核與資料風險控制。

options.label: 資料永久保留
options.rationale: 風險暴露過高。

options.label: 上線後再定
options.rationale: 合規風險不可接受。

clarifications.prompt: 訂單/薪資/審計資料的保留與刪除策略要採哪一種？
clarifications.rationale: 高敏資料處理需在 MVP 前鎖定政策。
clarifications.recommendationSummary: 已決議先定明確保留與刪除政策。

issues.details: 已鎖定資料保留與刪除策略方向。
issues.title: 資料保留與合規策略未定

options.label: 固定選項
options.rationale: 備餐風險最低，最易標準化。

options.label: 固定選項+短註記
options.rationale: 保留有限彈性且可控。

options.label: 不限自由文字
options.rationale: 出餐與標籤風險高。

clarifications.prompt: 特殊備註欄位要提供到什麼程度？
clarifications.rationale: 特殊備註粒度直接影響備餐正確率與客服負擔。
clarifications.recommendationSummary: 建議固定選項為主，可選受限短註記。

issues.details: 特殊備註最終粒度尚未鎖定，但不阻礙先行交付受控版本。
issues.title: 特殊備註控制範圍待決

options.label: 責任人+SLA流程
options.rationale: 能形成可治理閉環。

options.label: 串接工單系統
options.rationale: 提升跨部門協作與追蹤。

options.label: 僅通知不治理
options.rationale: 無法確保處置落地。

clarifications.prompt: 異常預警後續治理要採哪些流程能力？
clarifications.rationale: 若無治理流程，預警難以產生可追責結果。
clarifications.recommendationSummary: 建議至少落地責任人與 SLA，工單串接可選。

issues.details: 治理流程深度尚待確認，但可先實作基礎 owner/SLA 模型。
issues.title: 異常治理流程規格未定

activation.rationale: 正式 HTTP 契約與契約測試基礎完成後，所有後續 API 變更都必須受同一門檻約束。

checks: CI route-to-spec diff 無未登錄正式 endpoint。
OpenAPI 變更與生成型別/SDK 同 PR 提交。
錯誤碼與錯誤 schema 對應可被測試驗證。

reinforcements.instructions: 新增或修改正式 HTTP 行為時，必須同步更新契約與生成產物，否則拒絕合併。
reinforcements.name: HTTP Contract Sync Gate
reinforcements.policy: No externally used HTTP behavior may ship unless OpenAPI and generated artifacts are synchronized in the same change set.

activation.rationale: MCP 功能啟用時最容易發生規則分叉，需立即強制同源邏輯檢查。

checks: 每個 MCP write tool 可映射到共享 domain service。
MCP/HTTP 配對測試顯示驗證與錯誤行為一致。
不存在 MCP 專屬權限繞過路徑。

reinforcements.instructions: PR review 必須附 MCP tool-to-service 對照與權限驗證證據。
reinforcements.name: MCP Domain Parity Gate
reinforcements.policy: MCP tools/resources must reuse HTTP domain services and the same authorization/validation rules.

activation.rationale: 審計查詢能力完成後，所有高風險寫入都應進入統一不可竄改留痕。

checks: 高風險寫入事件包含 actorId、role、entityId、reason、timestamp。
審計紀錄採 append-only 或等效不可竄改模式。
可用 correlationId 串連跨流程操作鏈。

reinforcements.instructions: 下單、核銷、審核、退款、鎖帳等動作若缺少必要審計欄位不得上線。
reinforcements.name: High-Risk Write Audit Discipline
reinforcements.policy: All high-risk write operations must emit immutable, attributable audit events.

activation.rationale: 專案明確不追求向後相容，任何替代路徑都會增加維運風險。

checks: 變更後不存在 legacy/fallback 分支維持舊正式行為。
被取代的 handler/DTO/route 在同批次移除。
測試僅覆蓋現行正式流程。

reinforcements.instructions: 每次破壞式調整必須同步刪除舊路徑與舊測試。
reinforcements.name: No Legacy Path Rule
reinforcements.policy: Superseded compatibility and fallback paths must be removed immediately when new contracts ship.

activation.rationale: 第二階段能力必須與 MVP 核心路徑隔離，避免影響首階段驗收。

checks: Optional 功能在 MVP 環境預設 flag=false。
Flag 關閉時無對外入口與副作用 API。
具備可驗證的一鍵停用路徑。

reinforcements.instructions: Optional 功能 PR 需附 flag 設定與關閉驗證結果。
reinforcements.name: Optional Feature Flag Discipline
reinforcements.policy: All optional phase-2 capabilities must ship behind runtime feature flags defaulted OFF for MVP.

activation.rationale: 交易與核銷是尖峰風險核心，該能力屬於訂單與核銷功能本體。

checks: 壓測報告覆蓋尖峰場景且達成既定 p95/p99 與錯誤率門檻。
尖峰測試含下單與核銷並發場景。
Grafana 面板可即時觀測 SLO 指標。

reinforcements.instructions: 未通過硬性 SLO gate 不得進入 production。
reinforcements.name: Peak Load SLO Gate
reinforcements.policy: Order and pickup capabilities must pass hard pre-launch peak-load SLO validation.

activation.rationale: 財務能力啟用時需立即防止錯帳與不可追溯調整。

checks: 每期結算快照有唯一 cycle key 與摘要校驗。
同 cycle 重送具可驗證 idempotency。
例外清單完整覆蓋退款、扣款失敗、離職員工。

reinforcements.instructions: 結算上線前完成鎖帳、重跑、例外演練並保留證據。
reinforcements.name: Financial Close Integrity Gate
reinforcements.policy: Settlement and payroll outputs must be deterministic, idempotent, and fully auditable.

activation.rationale: 資料政策已決議，完成審計與薪資資料落地後應全面啟用。

checks: 保留年限、刪除/匿名化工作排程可被驗證。
高敏欄位加密與存取控制有測試覆蓋。
刪除/匿名化結果可於稽核查詢中追蹤。

reinforcements.instructions: 將資料保留與刪除政策落地為可執行工作流與測試，不接受文件化未落地。
reinforcements.name: Data Retention Enforcement
reinforcements.policy: Defined retention and deletion policy must be technically enforced for payroll, order, and audit data.

roles.name: Employee
responsibilities: Preorder meals across upcoming days and manage cutoff-bound changes.
Complete pickup verification through TOTP QR flow.
Track deductions, refunds, and dispute status transparently.

roles.name: Vendor Operator
responsibilities: Maintain menus, quotas, preorder windows, and stock changes.
Execute fulfillment using board, labels, partition sheets, and basket lists.
Review settlement summaries against platform records.

roles.name: Welfare Committee Admin
responsibilities: Review vendor onboarding/documents and apply suspension/reinstatement.
Configure vendor-plant service mappings and visibility scope.
Operate anomaly governance and settlement exception handling.

roles.name: HR Payroll Operator
responsibilities: Receive payroll deduction exports and return processing outcomes.
Handle deduction failures and termination-related exceptions.
Reconcile payroll results with settlement cycles.

roles.name: Product Manager
responsibilities: Own MVP scope boundaries and acceptance criteria.
Sequence backlog delivery across employee/vendor/admin flows.
Close remaining clarification issues and policy decisions.

roles.name: Backend Engineer (Rust)
responsibilities: Implement domain services, transactional rules, and API/MCP handlers.
Enforce authorization, validation, and immutable audit emission.
Maintain contract-synchronized OpenAPI and runtime behavior parity.

roles.name: Frontend Engineer (SvelteKit)
responsibilities: Build employee/vendor/admin interfaces from generated API types.
Implement discovery, preorder, fulfillment, and transparency experiences.
Keep optional capabilities behind controlled feature flags.

roles.name: QA Contract Automation Engineer
responsibilities: Create automated domain, integration, contract, and MCP behavior tests.
Run drift detection for spec, generated artifacts, and runtime responses.
Verify cutoff, inventory, settlement, and pickup regressions.

roles.name: Platform SRE
responsibilities: Operate Kubernetes deployment reliability and scaling controls.
Implement OTel-based observability to Victoria stack and Grafana.
Enforce release gates against peak-load SLO evidence.

roles.name: Security and Compliance Engineer
responsibilities: Define and review least-privilege authz for HTTP and MCP surfaces.
Validate retention/deletion and sensitive-data handling controls.
Approve high-risk operation governance and audit readiness.

summary: Backlog remains MVP-first with locked decisions preserved and execution order is semantically coherent for clean delivery: contract gates land early, observability/SLO baseline precedes peak-risk flows, and MCP parity is anchored on required domain surfaces. Reinforcement activation/prerequisites are valid and reference existing feature IDs only. Remaining uncertainty is limited to two non-blocking open clarifications (special-request schema depth and anomaly ticket integration depth).
